title: Module health stays local scorecard intelligence
summary: Kage module health borrows Repowise style module scorecards using the existing code graph, cleanup candidates, tests, git churn, and ownership concentration. Keep it local and deterministic; do not add a hosted DB or gen
body:
Kage module-health borrows Repowise-style module scorecards using the existing code graph, cleanup candidates, tests, git churn, and ownership concentration. Keep it local and deterministic; do not add a hosted DB or generated wiki layer for this.
Verified by: npm test --prefix mcp; node mcp/dist/cli.js module-health --project . --json
